feed.title: blank
feed.subtitle: Personal site of Nima Ghorbani — Principal AI Architect at Cubert Hyperspectral. Computer vision, hyperspectral imaging, 3D human understanding, and applied machine learning.

entry.title: Speaking at the Conference for Hyperspectral Imaging in Industry 2026

link.title: Speaking at the Conference for Hyperspectral Imaging in Industry 2026

entry.content:
I will be speaking at the Conference for Hyperspectral Imaging in Industry 2026, 20–21 May 2026 in Graz-Gösting, Austria.

My talk: CuvisNext: AI Evolution of Real-time Hyperspectral Intelligence — Nima Ghorbani, Cubert Hyperspectral.
entry.summary: Talk announcement — CuvisNext at HSI in Industry 2026, Graz-Gösting, Austria.
